description_long: This is a standard orange basketball with a pebbled, textured surface for grip and control. The ball features several black seams that divide it into symmetrical panels, typical of regulation basketballs. The surface appears to be made of synthetic or composite leather, giving it a matte, slightly grippy finish. There are no visible logos, brand markings, or inflation valves on any of the views. The ball shows no signs of wear, scuffing, or graffiti, indicating it is either new or well-maintained. Its size and proportions are consistent with those used in urban parks, gyms, and recreational courts.
description: A classic orange basketball with black seams and a textured, grippy surface. No visible logos, wear, or valve.
description_view_0: The basketball is seen from a side view, showing two prominent black seams running vertically and a pebbled orange surface.
description_view_1: This view is nearly identical to view 0, with the same vertical seams and textured orange surface visible.
description_view_2: The basketball is rotated, but the panel pattern and surface texture remain consistent with previous views.
description_view_3: Another side view, again showing the vertical seams and uniform orange pebbled surface.
attribute_panel_pattern: Eight-panel design with wide black seams dividing the ball into symmetrical sections.
